title: cerasus fruticosa f. acuta
intro: Cerasus fruticosa f. acuta is a variant of the cherry tree, specifically a form of the wild cherry tree (Prunus fruticosa), known for its narrow, upright growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cerasus fruticosa f. acuta include its potential to relieve pain, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
